zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Knyvet於1395年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可門德萊善姆時，她的父親John Knyvet38歲，母親Joan De Botetout40歲。她於1410年10月11日之前與Sir Robert Tye結婚。她去世於1467年在英國英格蘭素瑞享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Knyvet于1395年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可門德萊善姆时，她的父亲John Knyvet38岁，母亲Joan De Botetout40岁。她于1410年10月11日之前与Sir Robert Tye结婚。她去世于1467年在英国英格兰素瑞享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Knyvet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knivett
meanings: English: from a Norman French pronunciation of Knight , resulting from the Norman French difficulty with the h of Old English cniht.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Knyvet was born in 1395, in Mendlesham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Knyvet, was 38 and her mother, Joan De Botetout, was 40. She married Sir Robert Tye before 11 October 1410. She died in 1467, in Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Knyvet est née en 1395, à Mendlesham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Knyvet, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Joan De Botetout, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Tye avant 11 octobre 1410. Elle est décédée en 1467, à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Knyvet 1395 in Mendlesham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Knyvet 38 und ihre Mutter Joan De Botetout 40. Sie hat vor 11. Oktober 1410 Sir Robert Tye geheiratet. Sie starb 1467 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Knyvet è nata il nel 1395 nel Mendlesham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Knyvet, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Joan De Botetout, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Tye prima del 11 ottobre 1410. Morì nel 1467, nel Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Knyvet(이)가 1395년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 멘들레샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Knyvet(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan De Botetout(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1410년 10월 11일 이전 Sir Robert Tye(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1467년 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Knyvet родилась в 1395 г. в местности мендлешам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Knyvet было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan De Botetout, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Tye перед 11 октябрь 1410 г. Она умерла в 1467 г. в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.
